# gpui-starter

> A production-ready Rust boilerplate for building desktop applications with GPUI.

## What it is

gpui-starter is a boilerplate project for building desktop apps with [GPUI](https://github.com/zed-industries/zed), the GPU-accelerated UI framework by the Zed team. It includes multi-page navigation, 21 built-in themes, internationalization, form validation, and a command launcher — everything you need to skip the boilerplate and start building.

## Installation

```bash
git clone https://github.com/hmziqrs/gpui-boilerplate.git gpui-app
cd gpui-app
cargo run
```

Requires Rust (2024 edition) and on macOS: Xcode Command Line Tools. On Linux: Vulkan headers.

## Features

- **Multi-page architecture** — sidebar navigation with 6 views (Home, Form, Settings, About, Diagnostics, Notifications)
- **21 themes** — JSON theme files loaded via gpui-component. Catppuccin, Dracula, Nord, Gruvbox, Tokyo Night, Solarized, One Dark, Rose Pine, Everforest, Kanagawa, and more. Live switching via Cmd+K.
- **Internationalization** — English and Chinese (zh-CN) via es-fluent / Mozilla Fluent
- **Form validation** — derive macros via gpui-form + koruma validation rules
- **Command launcher** — Cmd+K fuzzy search across all app actions
- **macOS system tray** — icon with quick-access menu
- **Secure storage** — OS keychain integration via keyring crate
- **SQLite** — local data persistence via rusqlite
- **Notifications** — inbox and service system
- **Single instance** — prevents multiple app instances
- **Diagnostics** — built-in diagnostics page

## Tech stack

- Rust (2024 edition)
- GPUI (GPU-accelerated UI framework from Zed)
- gpui-component (UI component library)
- gpui-form (form builder with derive macros)
- es-fluent (Mozilla Fluent i18n)
- koruma (validation)
- rusqlite (SQLite)
- keyring (OS credential store)

## Project structure

```
src/
├── main.rs             # Entry point
├── app.rs              # AppRoot — main window
├── root.rs             # Root layout component
├── views/              # Page views (home, form, settings, about, diagnostics, notifications)
├── i18n/               # Fluent translation files (en.ftl, zh-CN.ftl)
├── launcher.rs         # Cmd+K command launcher
├── sidebar.rs          # Sidebar navigation
├── routes.rs           # Page routing
└── ...                 # Storage, tray, menus, shortcuts, etc.
themes/                 # 21 JSON theme files (not Rust code)
```

- Docs: https://gpui-starter.hmziq.xyz/docs/
